Global (All).title: Global Food Price Rise Due to Ukraine War Impact
Global (All).summary: Ukraine conflict fuels global food inflation fears, with wheat prices surging to highest level since 2008. The ongoing war has reduced Ukraine's grain export capacity.

Global (All).title: China Power Crisis Deepens Energy Shortage
Global (All).summary: China's energy crisis accelerates, with power outages affecting multiple provinces, impacting economic output and global supply chains.

Global (All).title: EU Imposes Fines on Tech Giants Over Data Breaches
Global (All).summary: European Union regulators have handed out hefty fines to major tech companies, including Amazon and Meta, over data breach concerns, raising concerns over data privacy and security.

South Korea.title: Suspected N. Korean drone detected near S. Korean border
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military detected a suspected North Korean drone near its border, amid heightened tensions between the two nations.

South Korea.title: South Korean politician charged over bribery allegations
South Korea.summary: A South Korean politician has been charged with bribery allegations in a case that has sparked public outrage.

South Korea.title: South Korea to review military alliance with US
South Korea.summary: South Korea's president has announced plans to review the country's military alliance with the United States, in light of changing global security dynamics.

Japan.title: Protests against nuclear plants to be held nationwide amid growing concerns about Japan's energy policy
Japan.summary: Thousands of protesters are expected to hold rallies in Tokyo, Osaka, and other cities against Japan's plan to restart nuclear power plants. The protests, which will take place over the weekend, are expected to draw a large crowd, with organizers expecting up to 100,000 people to participate.

Japan.title: Ransomware attack hits Japan's transportation system, disrupting services
Japan.summary: A ransomware attack has hit Japan's transportation system, disrupting services and causing delays for passengers. The attack, which occurred on Wednesday, affected multiple train lines and bus services, with operators working to restore normal services as quickly as possible.

Japan.title: Japan's inflation rate soars to 40-year high, sparking concerns about economic stability
Japan.summary: Japan's inflation rate has soared to a 40-year high, sparking concerns about economic stability. The Consumer Price Index (CPI) rose 4.3% in the year to March, exceeding market expectations and raising fears about the impact on households and businesses.
